DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT H. K. FIRE PROTECTION, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Robert De Vries (415.546.5100 x2000) for plaintiff and responding party; Charles H. Bolcom of Cooper & Scully (415.510.5816) for defendant and moving party.

The Court clarifies its tentative to sustain the demurrer as to the causes of action for product liability is without leave to amend. Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Each side to submit a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Valerie Jensen, CSR 4401 (Atkinson Baker, Inc., Tel: 800.288.3376) (501/REQ)

Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Joanna L. Storey of the law offices of Hassard Bonnington LLP (415-288-9800) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, WKPE Inc., dba Badger Fire Protection

No other appearance is made in this matter

DEFENDANT WKPE, INC., DBA BADGER FIRE PROTECTION's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT H. K. FIRE PROTECTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Patricia Lakner of Cooper Scully (415.956.9700) for moving party HK Fire Protection, Inc.; Robert DeVries of the Law Offices of Robert DeVries (415.546.5100 x2000) for plaintiff Delsie Incorporated; Joanna L. Storey of Hassard Bonnington LLP (415.288.9800) for defendant WKPE, Inc. and United Technologies Corporation.

Counsel report that after some discussion, they stipulate to consolidating this action with the related matter. As not all counsel to the cases are present, Defendant HK Fire Protection, Inc. will file a motion to consolidate to be heard on January 30, 2018. The demurrer is continued to January 30, 2018 to be heard with the motion to consolidate. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT H. K. FIRE PROTECTION, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT will be heard in department 501 on December 8, 2017. The moving party is to provide courtesy copies of the complaint that is the subject of the demurrer and the moving and reply papers to department 501 with a cover letter stating the new date of the hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
